description_long: This object is a compact shotgun with a metallic silver barrel and receiver, paired with a wooden-textured grip. The barrel is long and cylindrical, featuring a smooth surface with a few vent holes near the muzzle. The receiver is rectangular and robust, with a set of small raised elements on top, possibly representing a sight or mounting rail. The grip is angular and blocky, made to resemble wood, and is attached at a downward angle to the receiver. The trigger area is integrated into the receiver, but the trigger guard is minimal or absent, giving the weapon a utilitarian appearance. The overall design is simple, with no visible external magazine, pump, or lever, and the finish is matte with a slight sheen on the metal parts.
description: A compact, silver-metal shotgun with a long barrel and a blocky wooden grip, featuring a simple, utilitarian design and minimal external features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the silver barrel, the rectangular receiver, and the wooden grip.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back of the wooden grip and the underside of the receiver.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the length of the barrel, the flat top of the receiver, and the alignment of the grip.
description_view_3: Front angled view focusing on the muzzle end of the barrel and the side profile of the grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, smooth cylindrical barrel with vent holes near the muzzle
attribute_trigger_guard_design: minimal or absent, with no distinct rounded or squared guard visible
